name: Lori's Sour Cream Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring butter and eggs to room temperature.
2. Grease and flour the bottom and sides of a 10-inch bundt or tube pan; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter with an electric mixer until creamy.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating at medium speed until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating about one minute after each addition; scrape the bowl frequently to ensure smooth incorporation.
6. Beat for 2 additional minutes.
7. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt. Alternately add this dry mixture with sour cream into the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Mix well after each addition.
8. Add lemon, orange, and vanilla extracts; beat just until thoroughly blended.
9. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 1-1/2 hours, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean and dry.
11. Cool the cake in the pan on a wire rack for 15 minutes; then remove from the pan and cool completely.
12. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar if desired.
Makes 12 to 16 servings. Lori Norman/Wis Gramma
